caption: Set against a plain, light gray background, a short sequence features the emergence of various graphic elements. Initially, a red square icon with a white play symbol appears. This is followed by a circular logo containing the red text "I3 kanal" and the label "Kanal13AZ" printed below it in black. As the sequence progresses, a second instance of the circular logo appears on the left side of the screen, accompanied by the text "Kanal13AZ" and a small red button that reads "abuna ol". Finally, a third instance of the circular logo and the text "Kanal13AZ" appear on the right side of the screen, paired with a white button containing the text "bildirişləri aç". No people or physical locations are visible, as the visuals consist entirely of digital logos, text, and buttons.
